top_signals.title: Maritime Drone Self-Detonates in Constanta Port
top_signals.summary: A maritime drone self-detonated on Friday in Romania's Black Sea port of Constanta near an oil terminal, without causing casualties, as Ukraine accused Russia of jamming one of its vessels before it drifted into Romanian waters.The explosion…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Finnish Police Suspect Four People in Subsea Cable Breach
top_signals.summary: Finnish police investigating last year's damage to two subsea telecommunication cables in the Baltic Sea said on Friday that four people are suspected of a crime, and that prosecutors will decide on any charges.Finland seized the Fitburg cargo ship on December 31 while en route from Russia to Israel
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB Consumer Expectations Survey results – April 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority – Memorandum of Understanding on the supervision of Financial Market Infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Joint statement from the Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley lets clients lend bitcoin and other assets for in-kind spot crypto ETF conversions
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley Wealth Management and Galaxy Digital have partnered to let eligible clients lend crypto in exchange for crypto ETP shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Boris Vujčić: A European perspective on currency and convergence
Chancellor Rachel Reeves speech at the Scientific Superpower Conference
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has today (3 June) delivered a speech at the Scientific Superpower Conference.

top_signals.title: Fortune advances Nico cobalt-gold project as cash hurdle looms
top_signals.summary: The company expects full land and water authorizations in the Northwest Territories within two to three months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Solar silver thrifting not enough to curb demand
top_signals.summary: Silver demand has been consistently outpacing supply for the last six years, with the Silver Institute projecting a 46.3Moz deficit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hidden chemical weapons sites emerge in Syria amid fragile security transition
top_signals.summary: Over a decade after Syria agreed to dismantle its arsenal, international inspectors have uncovered scores of previously hidden chemical weapons materials.
